articles.title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs lose record $4.5B in June, eclipsing Strategy's $1.25B raise

articles.title: Former Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400M crypto Ponzi case
